prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L V12 (N73B67) forced-induction conversion via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (1.2 bar boost) with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes by Gintani Engineering, paired with a bespoke Motec M150 ECU reflash for 750+ HP at 5,800 RPM and 850 Nm of torque at 3,500 RPM, retaining the stock 6-speed ZF 6HP28A transmission but upgraded with a Level 10 torque converter and reinforced internals by Sonnax.

Cooling: Custom dual-core air-to-water intercooler system by CSF Racing with a 2.5-gallon ice reservoir and Bosch 1000W pump, integrated into the front bumper’s bespoke carbon fiber ducting (replacing the stock grille), alongside a PWR radiator with dual 16" SPAL fans and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for the stock cooling system.

Suspension/Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), custom-valved for the Phantom’s 2,680 kg curb weight, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers (hub-centric) and a bespoke H&R anti-roll bar kit (25mm front, 22mm rear) to reduce body roll by 40%. Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (405mm rotors) with Pagid RS29 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for fade resistance.
estetica: Aero: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Phantom Coupe kit), including extended front fenders (50mm per side), rear quarter panels (70mm per side), and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust tips (dual 4.5" outlets) by Akrapovic. Front splitter and rear wing are both adjustable (carbon fiber) by Vorsteiner, with a 30mm Gurney flap for downforce at speed.

Wheels: Forged 22" x 10.5" (front) and 22" x 12.5" (rear) HRE FF16 wheels in a custom brushed titanium finish with matte black accents, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 R22 front, 325/30 R22 rear) for track-focused grip. Center-lock adapters by DPE for rapid wheel changes.

Interior: Full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Saddleback Leather, with bespoke Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point harnesses) upholstered in Bridge of Weir leather and diamond-stitched Alcantara. Custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360) and a Motec C127 dash display replacing the stock instrument cluster.
